rationale: In the citing paper, Tunuguntla and Hoban (2021) is cited in the introduction to support a market-descriptive point: second-price auctions are still common when a publisher uses a single exchange. The citation functions as contextual background evidence about industry practice, not as a conceptual or methodological basis for the paper's game-theoretic model or results. There is no clear use of this cited work in hypothesis development, mechanism derivation, or interpretation of the main propositions.
